Lets take a little peek shall we?!

007n7 wasn't that fond with parties. Infact, he hated socializing. But, for you, i guess he just decided to come.. you had no idea how much he liked you,, you were really popular, so. He never took his chance knowing you'll probably turn him down, i mean.. he was a loser, he admits. So it would be impossible to get with you. Although, you both were bestfriends, you enjoyed his company. During the party, he stayed with your side, he didnt wanna get separated from you, the bright lights and loud music was already making him uncomfortable, but, your gorgeous presence made him forget about it. You and him were talking before you both get pulled in a room with other people in a circle. The guy who pulled you guys in exclaims 'seven minutes of heaven guys!', before you could protest, you both were pushed in the circle.. you just sigh and look at 007n7, the guy placed a bottle in the middle of the circle. 007n7 couldnt help but silently pray it would get you and him.. the circle spun, the suspense slowly giving 007n7 anxiety.. his heart drops seeing the bottle point at him..

“woah!! Seems like it got the loser!,”

The host exclaims.. he then spun again, 007n7 closes his eyes, wishing it was you.. and seems like the Gods were on his side. Because it pointed at you..
